title: Deposition of Olafsson

sections.body:
I haven’t spoken to her in two years. The server logs will show I was on a console call to Reykjavík from 21:30 to 23:45. I don't even have a key to the archive cabin; only the director and Halla possessed them.

Desk mark: doubtful. The same mark is set upon papers later proved sound. It was observed at the desk that fear and deceit oft borrow one another's garments.

Methinks the paper smelleth of haste, candle grease, and a conscience unquiet. The desk-note beneath it read only: “keep apart from the louder papers.”

subtitle: Desk mark: doubtful. The same mark is set upon papers later proved sound.
